prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 59 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 47–59 名区间；2026 年声誉评价中性/混合，主要涉及校园安检等管理措施，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度较热（总排名第 41），短视频曝光量中等偏上；历史无投档断档记录；新闻传播学 A、工商管理 A、应用经济学 A-、中国语言文学 A-、生物学 A-、药学 A-，共 6 个 A- 及以上学科，在综合类 211 中实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与暨南大学物理类招生专业（计算机、电子信息、自动化、电气等）高度契合；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 39.2 万，较 2025 年（约 37.96 万）增加约 3.3%，物理类考生估算约 26.4 万，竞争面扩大；暨南大学位于广东广州，与广西地理邻近，跨省报考热度较高；该校在广西招生占比约 2–3%，属中等偏上水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 11869 名、2026 年计划扩招约 5.6%（使位次数字增大）、本省考生总数增加（竞争加剧）以及工科专业热度持续偏高等因素，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年小幅后移；预测最低位次约 12300 名，区间 11800–12800 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 11800–12800 名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如 11500 名以内）可重点冲刺计算机、电子信息、电气等一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（12800 名附近）建议以三档保底为主，争取二档中等专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 13092→7594→8194→12571 (excluding the Sino-foreign cooperative special group 35727)→11869, with a fluctuation range of 8194–12571 in the past 3 years, and a baseline of about 11869 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Guangxi for science/physics category was 54 in 2021, 57 in 2022, 55 in 2023, 60 in 2024, and 72 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 76, an increase of about 5.6% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 59th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 47–59 range in recent years; reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus security and other management measures, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 41st overall), with medium-to-high short video exposure; no history of admission gaps; Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Biology A-, Pharmacy A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, showing outstanding strength among comprehensive 211 universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with Jinan University's physics category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation, Electrical Engineering, etc.); the total number of regular college entrance examination students in the province in 2026 is about 392,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (about 379,600), with an estimated 264,000 physics category examinees, expanding competition; Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, geographically close to Guangxi, with high cross-province application popularity; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2–3%, at an upper-middle level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 11869, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 5.6% (increasing the ranking number), the increase in the total number of students in the province (intensified competition), and the sustained high popularity of engineering majors, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly decrease compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 12300, with a range of 11800–12800.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11800–12800, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11500), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 12800), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety options while striving for Tier 2 moderate majors.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 59th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 47–59 range in recent years; reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed, mainly involving campus security and other management measures, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 41), with medium-to-high short video exposure; no history of admission cut-off gaps; Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A, Applied Economics A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, highly relevant to the liberal arts group enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Accounting, Business English, etc.).

专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are recommended as relatively popular; Accounting/Finance/Auditing are differentiated and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates for the 2026 ordinary college entrance examination in the province is about 392,000, with an estimated 128,000 history category candidates, an increase of about 7.3% compared to 2025 (about 119,000), expanding competition; Jinan University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, geographically close to Guangxi, with high cross-province application popularity; the university's enrollment proportion in Guangxi is about 2–3%, at an upper-medium level.

预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2100, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 8.7% (which reduces the ranking number), the increase in the total number of candidates in the province (intensifying competition), and the stable popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2000, with a range of 1640–2360.
